title: Sword daggers
description: Transforms swords into compact dagger-style textures with a clean vanilla-friendly design focused on PvP visibility and visual clarity.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5325eb254a840689f7261550bcb6c31a0ec7801.png)

Sword Daggers is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that redesigns default swords into compact dagger-style weapons while keeping the original vanilla aesthetic intact.

The pack focuses purely on visual appearance and does not modify gameplay mechanics, hitboxes, reach, or provide any competitive advantage.
Its goal is to offer a cleaner and more compact weapon design that feels visually comfortable during PvP, Survival, and SMP gameplay.

The shorter dagger-inspired look can help reduce screen clutter and provide a clearer first-person combat view while maintaining Minecraft’s familiar style.

---

##  Overview

Designed with PvP gameplay in mind, Sword Daggers replaces traditional sword textures with sleek dagger-style variants that appear smaller, cleaner, and more modern during combat.

The pack keeps textures lightweight and vanilla-friendly, making it suitable for players who prefer a minimal and competitive visual style without heavily changing Minecraft’s original appearance.

Every weapon is adjusted carefully to preserve readability and consistency while providing a fresh combat aesthetic for everyday gameplay.

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e213d62b05f5a8ff3727c79c194932ce3369fab.png)

---

## ✨ Features

> • Compact dagger-style sword textures
> • Cleaner first-person weapon appearance
> • Vanilla-friendly visual design
> • Lightweight and simple implementation
> • Suitable for PvP, SMP & Survival gameplay
> • Does not alter gameplay mechanics or hitboxes

---

## 🎮 Recommended For

> • PvP Players
> • SMP Servers
> • Competitive Gameplay
> • Minimalist Resource Pack Users

---

## 🧩 Resolution

> **16x Default Minecraft Resolution**

---

## 🛠 Compatibility

> **Minecraft 1.19+ / 1.20+ / 1.21+**

---

## 📜 Asset Ownership

All textures and modifications in **Sword Daggers** were created by me.
No assets were copied or extracted from other resource packs.

---

### 👤 Creator

> by **GAMER_TIGE99**
